---
title: "Tracing"
filters:
  - include-code-files
format:
  html:
    highlight-style: ayu
---

If something is not working as expected, you can use `make --trace` or `remake
--trace` to trace what make is doing at each step.

::: {.callout-note .column-screen-inset collapse="true"}
### Adding `--trace` to `make`
```{.diff include="tracing-diff-make.txt" code-line-numbers="true"}
```
:::

::: {.callout-note .column-screen-inset collapse="true"}
### Comparing `make` with `remake`
```{.diff include="tracing-diff-make-remake.txt" code-line-numbers="true"}
```
:::
